overview: UdyamSathi is a rural entrepreneurship platform helping users in Bihar, India start and run small businesses in agriculture, fishery, poultry, and goat farming. It connects rural users with experts for guidance, field support, training, and resource supply — with full case management, AI business recommendations, and a real backend that captures leads and tracks every user journey.
features: Company rebranded to UdyamSathi with consistent branding across all pages
Complete footer with address, phone, WhatsApp, email, and working hours
Contact page with click-to-call, WhatsApp chat button, and working hours (Mon–Sat 9AM–6PM)
Real backend with persistent storage for users, cases, and contact leads
Case management: automatic Case ID generation, Pending/In Progress/Completed status
Admin panel: view all cases, assign experts, update status and notes
User dashboard: My Requests, AI results, progress tracker, Request Expert Call button
AI business recommendation quiz with results saved to user profile
5-step How It Works: Register → Submit → Expert Help → Start Business → Earn Income
Team section with all 5 UdyamSathi team members
Pricing section: Consultation, Setup, Training, Premium tiers
Resource catalog with supply request system
